properties.name: api-assist.log.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the entire API logging filter.

properties.name: api-assist.log.app-name
properties.description: Logical name of this application. Included in every log entry as appName.

properties.name: api-assist.log.include-paths
properties.description: Ant-style URL path patterns to include for logging. When non-empty, only matching paths are logged (e.g. /api/**). Takes precedence over exclude-paths.

properties.name: api-assist.log.exclude-paths
properties.description: Ant-style URL path patterns to exclude from logging (e.g. /actuator/**).

properties.name: api-assist.log.mask-headers
properties.description: Request header names whose values are replaced with *** in the log.

properties.name: api-assist.log.mask-request-body
properties.description: Replace the entire request body with *** instead of recording the actual content.

properties.name: api-assist.log.mask-response-body
properties.description: Replace the entire response body with *** instead of recording the actual content.

properties.name: api-assist.log.max-body-size
properties.description: Maximum number of characters recorded for request/response bodies. Excess is truncated.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.db.enabled
properties.description: Enable DB table storage using the application's configured DataSource. Requires spring-boot-starter-jdbc.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.db.table-name
properties.description: Name of the table used to store API logs.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.db.auto-create-table
properties.description: Automatically execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on startup.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.local-file.enabled
properties.description: Enable local file storage.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.local-file.path
properties.description: Directory path where log files are written.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.local-file.logs-per-file
properties.description: Number of log entries buffered before a new file is flushed.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.local-file.flush-interval-seconds
properties.description: Interval in seconds at which buffered log entries are flushed to a file, regardless of logs-per-file. Set to 0 to disable.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.local-file.format
properties.description: Output file format. JSON produces JSONL; CSV produces a CSV with a header row.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.enabled
properties.description: Enable Supabase PostgreSQL storage with a dedicated connection (independent of the app DataSource).

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.jdbc-url
properties.description: JDBC URL for the Supabase PostgreSQL database. e.g. jdbc:postgresql://db.[project-ref].supabase.co:5432/postgres

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.username
properties.description: Supabase DB username.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.password
properties.description: Supabase DB password (found in Project Settings > Database).

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.table-name
properties.description: Name of the table used to store API logs.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-db.auto-create-table
properties.description: Automatically execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on startup.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.enabled
properties.description: Enable Supabase S3-compatible storage.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.endpoint-url
properties.description: Supabase S3-compatible endpoint URL. Format: https://[project-ref].supabase.co/storage/v1/s3

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.access-key-id
properties.description: S3 access key ID — found in Supabase Dashboard > Project Settings > Storage > S3 Access Keys.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.secret-access-key
properties.description: S3 secret access key — generated when creating Supabase S3 access keys.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.region
properties.description: AWS region string.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.bucket
properties.description: Target bucket name in Supabase Storage.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.key-prefix
properties.description: S3 object key prefix (acts as a folder path).

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.logs-per-file
properties.description: Number of log entries buffered before uploading a new file.

properties.name: api-assist.log.storage.supabase-s3.format
properties.description: Output file format.

properties.name: api-assist.log.view.enabled
properties.description: Enable the built-in view API (log ingestion + query endpoints). Requires DB storage.

properties.name: api-assist.log.view.base-path
properties.description: Base path for all view API endpoints.

properties.name: api-assist.log.view.api-key
properties.description: When set, all view API requests must include the X-Api-Key header. Leave blank to disable authentication.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.server-info.name
properties.description: Display name of this MCP server, exposed in the server-info response.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.server-info.version
properties.description: Version string of this MCP server, exposed in the server-info response.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.transport.sse.enabled
properties.description: Enable the SSE (Server-Sent Events) transport endpoint for MCP communication.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.transport.sse.base-path
properties.description: Base path for the SSE transport endpoint.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.transport.http.enabled
properties.description: Enable the HTTP (Streamable HTTP) transport endpoint for MCP communication.

properties.name: api-assist.mcp.transport.base-path
properties.description: Base path for the HTTP transport endpoint.

properties.name: api-assist.document.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the API document feature that introspects and exposes Spring MVC endpoint metadata.

properties.name: api-assist.document.view.base-path
properties.description: Base path for the API document query endpoints.

values.description: JSONL — one JSON object per line
CSV — header row followed by data rows
JSONL — one JSON object per line
CSV — header row followed by data rows
